keyPointsSummary: Used to = past habit, Could = past ability
Should have / Must have / Could have / Would have / May have / Might have = perfect modals + V3, each shows a different level of certainty or regret
Will/Shall = future action, Ought to = moral duty, Dare = courage

quickQuiz.answer: I used to go to school daily.

quickQuiz.hindi: मैं बचपन में तैर सकता था।
quickQuiz.answer: I could swim when I was a child.

quickQuiz.hindi: उसने जरूर बहुत मेहनत की होगी।
quickQuiz.answer: He must have worked very hard.

quickQuiz.hindi: मैं यह पहले कर सकता था।
quickQuiz.answer: I could have done this earlier.

quickQuiz.hindi: अगर मुझे पता होता, तो मैं आता।
quickQuiz.answer: If I had known, I would have come.

quickQuiz.hindi: वह शायद गया होगा, लेकिन पक्का नहीं।
quickQuiz.answer: He might have gone, but I am not sure.

quickQuiz.hindi: हमें अपने माता-पिता की इज्जत करनी चाहिए।
quickQuiz.answer: We ought to respect our parents.

mustRememberRules: Used to = past habit, Could = past ability
Should have / Must have / Could have / Would have / May have / Might have = perfect modals + V3, each shows a different level of certainty or regret
Will/Shall = future action, Ought to = moral duty, Dare = courage
